description: Style NoteThis mid-rise bikini from facit is crafted using the best jersey knit, that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The bikini provides a smooth Fit without binding, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort.Product DetailsKhaki trophy bikini brief that has a high cut for free leg movement, wide and comfortable fabric covered waistband that provides super soft, smooth and comfortable grip with printed branding for abrasion free comfortMaterial and Care100% premium cottonMachine wash warm at 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanTumble dry low
